---
title: "Response across visits by analyte and antigen"
subtitle: "Separately by untransformed and standardized"
author: "Scot Zens"
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
    number_sections: false
    theme: cosmo
    highlight: textmate
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
## workflowr::wflow_build(files = here("./analysis/response_bubbles_matpm_v3.Rmd"))
library(data.table) # for the function in the connection_transform.R code
library(tidyverse)  # for dplyr, ggplot2, forcats, tidyr, stringr, tibble, and magrittr pipe
library(here)       # for here::here used in file paths
library(reshape2)   # for reshape2::pivot_wider 
library(RColorBrewer) # for brewer.pal color palettes
library(flextable)  # for the Lancet-styled effect-size / p-value table
library(officer)    # for fp_border() used in flextable styling and docx export

## compute_arm_effect(): single source of truth for the maternal-arm contrast.
## Returns the per-antigen x analyte statistics that drive BOTH the bubble plot
## and the effect-size / p-value table. Effect size = median(log10 TT) -
## median(log10 TdaP); positive => lower in TdaP, negative => higher in TdaP.
## p-values are Wilcoxon rank-sum, Bonferroni-corrected across all tested cells.
compute_arm_effect <- function(data = NULL,
                               analyte_order = c("IgG","IgG3","IgG1","IgG2","IgG4",
                                                 "FcgR2a","FcgR3b","ADCD","ADCP","ADNP",
                                                 "SBA","PTNA"),
                               antigen_order = c("PT","FHA","PRN","FIM","DT","TT"),
                               standstat = NULL) {
  unique_arms <- base::unique(data$arm_name)
  if (!all(c("TT", "TdaP") %in% unique_arms)) {
    base::stop("arm_name must contain both 'TT' and 'TdaP'")
  }

  stats_df <- data %>%
    dplyr::group_by(antigen, analyte) %>%
    dplyr::summarize(
      mTT_vals   = list(log_assay_value[arm_name == "TT"]),
      mTdaP_vals = list(log_assay_value[arm_name == "TdaP"]),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::rowwise() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      n_TT      = length(unlist(mTT_vals)),
      n_TdaP    = length(unlist(mTdaP_vals)),
      test_res  = list(stats::wilcox.test(unlist(mTT_vals), unlist(mTdaP_vals), exact = FALSE)),
      p_value   = test_res$p.value,
      median_mTT   = stats::median(unlist(mTT_vals)),
      median_mTdaP = stats::median(unlist(mTdaP_vals)),
      effect_size  = median_mTT - median_mTdaP,
      # fold-difference of TdaP relative to TT on the linear (anti-log10) scale
      fold_TdaP_vs_TT = 10^(median_mTdaP - median_mTT),
      direction = dplyr::case_when(
        effect_size > 0 ~ "Lower TdaP",
        effect_size < 0 ~ "Higher TdaP",
        TRUE ~ "No effect"
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

  stats_df$p_value <- ifelse(stats_df$direction == "No effect", 1, stats_df$p_value)
  stats_df$p_adj <- stats::p.adjust(stats_df$p_value, method = "bonferroni", n = nrow(stats_df))
  stats_df$significant <- stats_df$p_adj < 0.05

  stats_df$analyte <- forcats::fct_relevel(as.factor(stats_df$analyte),
                                            analyte_order[analyte_order %in% stats_df$analyte])
  stats_df$antigen <- forcats::fct_relevel(as.factor(stats_df$antigen),
                                            antigen_order[antigen_order %in% stats_df$antigen])
  stats_df$standstat <- standstat
  stats_df %>% dplyr::select(-mTT_vals, -mTdaP_vals, -test_res) %>% dplyr::arrange(antigen, analyte)
}

plot_arm_effect <- function(data = NULL,
                               effect_color = c("Lower TdaP" = "salmon", "Higher TdaP" = "skyblue", "No effect" = "darkgrey"),
                               analyte_order = c("IgG", "IgG1", "FcgR2a", "ADCD"),
                               antigen_order = c("PT", "FHA", "PRN", "FIM", "DT", "TT"),
                            standstat = NULL) {
  # Check arm_name has exactly the two groups "TT" and "TdaP"
  unique_arms <- base::unique(data$arm_name)
  if (!all(c("TT", "TdaP") %in% unique_arms)) {
    base::stop("arm_name must contain both 'TT' and 'TdaP'")
  }
  
  # Stats are computed by the shared helper so the figure and the
  # effect-size / p-value table are guaranteed to be identical.
  stats_df <- compute_arm_effect(data = data,
                                 analyte_order = analyte_order,
                                 antigen_order = antigen_order,
                                 standstat = standstat)

  # Prepare parameters for border size for significance
  stats_df <- stats_df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      border_size = dplyr::if_else(significant, 1.5, 0.5)
    )

  # Build the plot
  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(stats_df, ggplot2::aes(x = analyte, y = antigen)) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(ggplot2::aes(
      size = abs(effect_size),
      fill = direction,
      stroke = border_size
    ), color = "black", shape = 21, show.legend = TRUE) +
    
    ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(name = "Effect direction", values = effect_color) +
    ggplot2::scale_color_manual(name = "Effect direction", values = effect_color) +
    ggplot2::scale_size_continuous(name = "Effect size (|median diff|)", range = c(3, 10)) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(name = "Analyte") +
    ggplot2::scale_y_discrete(name = "Antigen") +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = "Maternal vaccination effects on serology response",
      caption = "Non-parametric Wilcoxon rank sum tests for effect of vaccination on log transformed MFI, \nwith Bonferroni correction for multiple testing (threshold p < 0.05 show points with bold borders)."
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_bw() +
    ggplot2::theme(
      plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      legend.position = "right"
    ) +
    guides(
      fill = ggplot2::guide_legend(order = 1),
      color = "none", # Hide duplicate color legend (we just want fill)
      size = ggplot2::guide_legend(order = 2),
      stroke = ggplot2::guide_legend(order = 3)
    ) 
  return(p)
}


## lancet_effect_table(): render the effect-size / p-value statistics that
## underlie a bubble plot as a publication-quality (Lancet-styled) flextable.
## Pass the data.frame returned by compute_arm_effect(). Human-readable analyte
## and antigen labels are applied, p-values are formatted in Lancet style
## (e.g. "<0.0001", "0.024"), and significant rows (Bonferroni p<0.05) are bold.
lancet_pval <- function(p) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(p)      ~ "..",
    p < 0.0001    ~ "<0.0001",
    p < 0.001     ~ formatC(p, format = "f", digits = 4),
    TRUE          ~ formatC(p, format = "f", digits = 3)
  )
}

lancet_effect_table <- function(stats_df,
                                caption = NULL,
                                analyte_labels = c(IgG = "Total IgG", IgG1 = "IgG1",
                                                   IgG2 = "IgG2", IgG3 = "IgG3", IgG4 = "IgG4",
                                                   FcgR2a = "Fc\u03b3RIIa binding",
                                                   FcgR3b = "Fc\u03b3RIIIb binding",
                                                   ADCD = "ADCD", ADCP = "ADCP", ADNP = "ADNP",
                                                   SBA = "SBA", PTNA = "PTNA"),
                                antigen_labels = c(PT = "Pertussis toxin", FHA = "FHA",
                                                   PRN = "Pertactin", FIM = "FIM2/3",
                                                   DT = "Diphtheria toxoid", TT = "Tetanus toxoid")) {
  tbl <- stats_df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Antigen   = dplyr::recode(as.character(antigen), !!!antigen_labels),
      Analyte   = dplyr::recode(as.character(analyte), !!!analyte_labels),
      n         = paste0(n_TT, "/", n_TdaP),
      `Median (TT)`        = formatC(median_mTT,   format = "f", digits = 2),
      `Median (Tdap-IPV)`  = formatC(median_mTdaP, format = "f", digits = 2),
      `Difference*`        = formatC(effect_size,  format = "f", digits = 2),
      `Fold (Tdap-IPV vs TT)` = formatC(fold_TdaP_vs_TT, format = "f", digits = 2),
      Direction = dplyr::case_when(
        !significant ~ "No significant difference",
        direction == "Higher TdaP" ~ "Higher with Tdap-IPV",
        direction == "Lower TdaP"  ~ "Higher with tetanus toxoid",
        TRUE ~ "No significant difference"
      ),
      `p value`          = lancet_pval(p_value),
      `Adjusted p value` = lancet_pval(p_adj),
      .keep = "none",
      significant = significant, antigen = antigen, analyte = analyte
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(antigen, analyte)

  bold_rows <- which(tbl$significant)
  tbl_show <- tbl %>% dplyr::select(Antigen, Analyte, n,
                                    `Median (TT)`, `Median (Tdap-IPV)`,
                                    `Difference*`, `Fold (Tdap-IPV vs TT)`,
                                    Direction, `p value`, `Adjusted p value`)

  thick <- officer::fp_border(color = "black", width = 1.5)
  thin  <- officer::fp_border(color = "black", width = 0.5)

  ft <- flextable::flextable(tbl_show) %>%
    flextable::font(fontname = "Arial", part = "all") %>%
    flextable::fontsize(size = 8, part = "all") %>%
    flextable::fontsize(size = 8, part = "header") %>%
    flextable::bold(part = "header") %>%
    flextable::align(align = "left",  j = c("Antigen", "Analyte", "Direction"), part = "all") %>%
    flextable::align(align = "center", j = c("n", "Median (TT)", "Median (Tdap-IPV)",
                                             "Difference*", "Fold (Tdap-IPV vs TT)",
                                             "p value", "Adjusted p value"), part = "all") %>%
    flextable::border_remove() %>%
    flextable::hline_top(border = thick, part = "header") %>%
    flextable::hline_bottom(border = thin, part = "header") %>%
    flextable::hline_bottom(border = thick, part = "body") %>%
    flextable::merge_v(j = "Antigen") %>%
    flextable::valign(j = "Antigen", valign = "top") %>%
    flextable::padding(padding.top = 2, padding.bottom = 2, part = "all")

  if (length(bold_rows) > 0) ft <- flextable::bold(ft, i = bold_rows, part = "body")
  if (!is.null(caption)) ft <- flextable::set_caption(ft, caption)
  ft <- flextable::add_footer_lines(ft,
    "Effect of maternal vaccination on infant nasal/serum systems-serology features at month 2 (pre-primary vaccination), comparing infants born to mothers who received Tdap-IPV versus tetanus toxoid in pregnancy. Values are medians of log10-transformed signal. *Difference = median(TT) - median(Tdap-IPV) on the log10 scale; a negative difference indicates a higher value in the Tdap-IPV group. Fold = anti-log10 of the Tdap-IPV minus TT difference (Tdap-IPV relative to TT). p values are from two-sided Wilcoxon rank-sum tests; adjusted p values use Bonferroni correction across all tested antigen x analyte combinations. Bold rows are significant at adjusted p<0.05. ADCD=antibody-dependent complement deposition. ADCP=antibody-dependent cellular phagocytosis. ADNP=antibody-dependent neutrophil phagocytosis. FHA=filamentous haemagglutinin. PTNA=pertussis toxin neutralising activity. SBA=serum bactericidal activity.")
  ft <- flextable::fontsize(ft, size = 7, part = "footer")
  ft <- flextable::autofit(ft)
  ft
}

#### set options
options(useFancyQuotes = FALSE)

manu <- "Responses across visits"
# selected_maternal_arm <- selected_maternal_arm <- "TdaP"
# selected_maternal_arm <- selected_maternal_arm <- "TT"
marm_list <- as.vector(c("TdaP", "TT"))
iarm_list <- as.vector(c("aP", "wP"))

#### load colors
source(here::here("./code/colors.R"), local = TRUE)
iarm.apwps.color <- c('aP' = "dodgerblue2",'wP' = "forestgreen")
marm.apwps.color <- c('TdaP' = "skyblue",'TT' = "salmon")

color.Welch.fill <- brewer.pal(3, "YlGn")[2]

covariate.colors <- c(
  "arm_name" = "tomato",
  "birth_weight" = "lightblue",
  "infant_sex" = "forestgreen",
  "delivery_mode" = "#9467bd",
  "parity" = "#8c564b",
  "gravidity" = "firebrick",
  "gestational_age_vaccination" = "darkorange",
  "vaccine_birth_interval_days" = "steelblue",
  "gestational_age_birth" = "mediumseagreen",
  "maternal_age" = "salmon",
  # "log_igg_t0" = "#AF8DC3",
  "Residual" = "yellow",
  "DT_IgGt0" = "#23AECE",
  "FHA_IgGt0" = "#C51B7D", 
  "PRN_IgGt0" = "#FEE08B", 
  "PT_IgGt0" = "#5EA4A2", 
  "TT_IgGt0" = "#E04C5C"
)

antigen.colors <- c(
  "zmixture" = "firebrick",
  "zPC1" = "salmon",
  "zPC2" = "#E04C5C",
  "DT" = "#FEE08B",
  "FHA" = "#23AECE",
  "PRN" = "steelblue",
  "PT" = "#AF8DC3",
  "FIM" = "darkorange",
  "TT" = "mediumseagreen" 
)

source(here::here("./code/connection_transform.R"), local = TRUE)

# include_feature <- c("DT_IgG","DT_IgG1","DT_IgG2","DT_IgG3","DT_IgG4","DT_ADCD","DT_ADNP","DT_ADCP","DT_FcgR2a","DT_FcgR3b",
#       "TT_IgG","TT_IgG1","TT_IgG2","TT_IgG3","TT_IgG4","TT_ADCD","TT_ADNP","TT_ADCP","TT_FcgR2a","TT_FcgR3b","TT_Bmem",
#       "PT_IgG","PT_IgG1","PT_IgG2","PT_IgG3","PT_IgG4","PT_ADCD","PT_ADNP","PT_ADCP","PT_FcgR2a","PT_FcgR3b","PT_Bmem",
#       "FHA_IgG","FHA_IgG1","FHA_IgG2","FHA_IgG3","FHA_IgG4","FHA_ADCD","FHA_ADNP","FHA_ADCP","FHA_FcgR2a","FHA_FcgR3b","FHA_Bmem",
#       "PRN_IgG","PRN_IgG1","PRN_IgG2","PRN_IgG3","PRN_IgG4","PRN_ADCD","PRN_ADNP","PRN_ADCP","PRN_FcgR2a","PRN_FcgR3b",
#       ## --- FIM2/3 antigen: total IgG, subclasses, FcgR binding and effector functions ---
#       "FIM_IgG","FIM_IgG1","FIM_IgG2","FIM_IgG3","FIM_IgG4","FIM_ADCD","FIM_ADNP","FIM_ADCP","FIM_FcgR2a","FIM_FcgR3b",
#       ## --- functional assays remapped to a representative antigen (see functional_remap) ---
#       "PRN_SBA",   # WHOLE_SBA  -> displayed under PRN
#       "PT_PTNA")   # WHOLE_PTNA -> displayed under PT
# 
# include_feature_wo <- c("DT_IgG1","DT_IgG2","DT_IgG3","DT_IgG4","DT_ADCD","DT_ADNP","DT_ADCP","DT_FcgR2a","DT_FcgR3b",
#       "TT_IgG1","TT_IgG2","TT_IgG3","TT_IgG4","TT_ADCD","TT_ADNP","TT_ADCP","TT_FcgR2a","TT_FcgR3b","TT_Bmem",
#       "PT_IgG1","PT_IgG2","PT_IgG3","PT_IgG4","PT_ADCD","PT_ADNP","PT_ADCP","PT_FcgR2a","PT_FcgR3b","PT_Bmem",
#       "FHA_IgG1","FHA_IgG2","FHA_IgG3","FHA_IgG4","FHA_ADCD","FHA_ADNP","FHA_ADCP","FHA_FcgR2a","FHA_FcgR3b","FHA_Bmem",
#       "PRN_IgG1","PRN_IgG2","PRN_IgG3","PRN_IgG4","PRN_ADCD","PRN_ADNP","PRN_ADCP","PRN_FcgR2a","PRN_FcgR3b",
#       "FIM_IgG1","FIM_IgG2","FIM_IgG3","FIM_IgG4","FIM_ADCD","FIM_ADNP","FIM_ADCP","FIM_FcgR2a","FIM_FcgR3b",
#       "PRN_SBA","PT_PTNA")

include_feature <- c("DT_IgG","DT_IgG1","DT_IgG2","DT_IgG3","DT_IgG4","DT_ADCD","DT_ADNP","DT_ADCP","DT_FcgR2a","DT_FcgR3b",
      "TT_IgG","TT_IgG1","TT_IgG2","TT_IgG3","TT_IgG4","TT_ADCD","TT_ADNP","TT_ADCP","TT_FcgR2a","TT_FcgR3b",
      "PT_IgG","PT_IgG1","PT_IgG2","PT_IgG3","PT_IgG4","PT_ADCD","PT_ADNP","PT_ADCP","PT_FcgR2a","PT_FcgR3b",
      "FHA_IgG","FHA_IgG1","FHA_IgG2","FHA_IgG3","FHA_IgG4","FHA_ADCD","FHA_ADNP","FHA_ADCP","FHA_FcgR2a","FHA_FcgR3b",
      "PRN_IgG","PRN_IgG1","PRN_IgG2","PRN_IgG3","PRN_IgG4","PRN_ADCD","PRN_ADNP","PRN_ADCP","PRN_FcgR2a","PRN_FcgR3b",
      ## --- FIM2/3 antigen: total IgG, subclasses, FcgR binding and effector functions ---
      "FIM_IgG","FIM_IgG1","FIM_IgG2","FIM_IgG3","FIM_IgG4","FIM_ADCD","FIM_ADNP","FIM_ADCP","FIM_FcgR2a","FIM_FcgR3b",
      ## --- functional assays remapped to a representative antigen (see functional_remap) ---
      "PRN_SBA",   # WHOLE_SBA  -> displayed under PRN
      "PT_PTNA")   # WHOLE_PTNA -> displayed under PT

include_feature_wo <- c("DT_IgG1","DT_IgG2","DT_IgG3","DT_IgG4","DT_ADCD","DT_ADNP","DT_ADCP","DT_FcgR2a","DT_FcgR3b",
      "TT_IgG1","TT_IgG2","TT_IgG3","TT_IgG4","TT_ADCD","TT_ADNP","TT_ADCP","TT_FcgR2a","TT_FcgR3b",
      "PT_IgG1","PT_IgG2","PT_IgG3","PT_IgG4","PT_ADCD","PT_ADNP","PT_ADCP","PT_FcgR2a","PT_FcgR3b",
      "FHA_IgG1","FHA_IgG2","FHA_IgG3","FHA_IgG4","FHA_ADCD","FHA_ADNP","FHA_ADCP","FHA_FcgR2a","FHA_FcgR3b",
      "PRN_IgG1","PRN_IgG2","PRN_IgG3","PRN_IgG4","PRN_ADCD","PRN_ADNP","PRN_ADCP","PRN_FcgR2a","PRN_FcgR3b",
      "FIM_IgG1","FIM_IgG2","FIM_IgG3","FIM_IgG4","FIM_ADCD","FIM_ADNP","FIM_ADCP","FIM_FcgR2a","FIM_FcgR3b",
      "PRN_SBA","PT_PTNA")

## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Functional assays measured against whole B pertussis but, for display in the
## bubble plots, attributed to the single antigen that biologically dominates
## the response. These are pulled from the raw data, relabelled, and bound back
## in (see the loaddata chunk). ADJUST source_feature here if the raw feature
## strings differ in c_set.RData (verify with table(ebaa_extra$feature)).
##   WHOLE_SBA  -> SBA  under PRN  (serum bactericidal activity, PRN-dominated)
##   WHOLE_PTNA -> PTNA under PT   (pertussis toxin neutralising activity)
## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
functional_remap <- tibble::tribble(
  ~source_feature, ~display_antigen, ~display_analyte,
  "WHOLE_SBA",     "PRN",            "SBA",
  "WHOLE_PTNA",    "PT",             "PTNA"
)

### select covariates, set time points for difference and fold-change, name variables
covariates <- c("birth_weight", "infant_sex", "delivery_mode", "parity", "gravidity", "gestational_age_vaccination", "vaccine_birth_interval_days", "gestational_age_birth", 
"maternal_age", "log_igg_t0")

covariates_named_list <- list(
  "Arm Name" = "arm_name",
  "Birth Weight" = "birth_weight",
  "Infant Sex" = "infant_sex",
  "Delivery Mode" = "delivery_mode",
  "Parity" = "parity",
  # "Gravidity" = "gravidity",
  "Gestational Age at Vaccine" = "gestational_age_vaccination",
  "Infant Interval Between Vaccination and Delivery Days" = "vaccine_birth_interval_days",
  "Gestational Age at Delivery" = "gestational_age_birth",
  "Maternal Age at Vaccination" = "maternal_age",
  "Maternal BMI at Vaccination" = "maternal_bmi",
  "Maternal hemoglobin" = "maternal_Hb"
  # "Baseline IgG" = "log_igg_t0",
  # "Baseline DT IgG" = "DT_IgGt0",
  # "Baseline FHA IgG" = "FHA_IgGt0", 
  # "Baseline PRN IgG" = "PRN_IgGt0", 
  # "Baseline PT IgG" = "PT_IgGt0", 
  # "Baseline TT IgG" = "TT_IgGt0"
)

covariate.colors <- c(
  "arm_name" = "tomato",
  "birth_weight" = "lightblue",
  "infant_sex" = "forestgreen",
  "delivery_mode" = "#9467bd",
  "parity" = "#8c564b",
  "gravidity" = "firebrick",
  "gestational_age_vaccination" = "darkorange",
  "vaccine_birth_interval_days" = "steelblue",
  "gestational_age_birth" = "mediumseagreen",
  "maternal_age" = "salmon",
  "maternal_bmi" = "#FEE08B",
  "maternal_Hb" = "#C51B7D" 
  # "log_igg_t0" = "#AF8DC3",
  # "Residual" = "yellow",
  # "DT_IgGt0" = "#23AECE",
  # "FHA_IgGt0" = "#C51B7D", 
  # "PRN_IgGt0" = "#FEE08B", 
  # "PT_IgGt0" = "#5EA4A2", 
  # "TT_IgGt0" = "#E04C5C"
)

covar_list <- c("arm_name","infant_sex", "delivery_mode", "parity", "gravidity")
selected_covar <- 1

covar_cont_list <- c("birth_weight",
                    "gestational_age_vaccination",
                    "vaccine_birth_interval_days",
                    "gestational_age_birth",
                    "maternal_age", "log_igg_t0"
                     )
selected_covar_cont <- 1

covar_cat_list <- c("arm_name","infant_sex", "delivery_mode", "parity", "gravidity")
selected_covar_cat <- 1

igglist <- c("DT_IgG", "FHA_IgG", "PRN_IgG", "PT_IgG", "TT_IgG", "FIM_IgG")

t0 <- "M02"
# t1 <- "Mo4"
t1 <- "M05"
t2 <- "M09"
visit_list <- c(t0,t1,t2)
# visit_list <- c(t0,t1,t2,t3)

visit_label <- function(visit = "vaccinated") {
  case_when(
    visit == "M02" ~ "month 2",
    visit == "M04" ~ "month 4",
    visit == "M05" ~ "month 5",
    visit == "M09" ~ "month 9",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_  # optional: for cases that don't match
  )
}

visit_number <- function(visit = "vaccinated") {
  case_when(
    visit == "M02" ~ 2,
    visit == "M04" ~ 4,
    visit == "M05" ~ 5,
    visit == "M09" ~ 9
  )
}
            
# Helper function to convert p-values to significance labels
pvalue_to_label <- function(p) {
  if(p < 0.001) return("***")
  else if (p < 0.01) return("**")
  else if (p < 0.05) return("*")
  else return("ns")
}

tdiff1 <- "M02/M05"
tfold1 <- "M02/M05_fold"
tdiff2 <- "M09/M05"
tfold2 <- "M05/M09_fold"

antigen_list <- c("PT", "FHA", "PRN", "FIM", "DT", "TT")
# analytelist<-c("ADCD", "ADCP", "ADNP","IgG", "IgG1", "IgG2", "IgG3", "IgG4","FcgR2a","FcgR3b")
# igglist<-c("DT_IgG", "gB_IgG","FHA_IgG", "PRN_IgG", "PT_IgG", "TT_IgG")
# fulligglist<-c("ELISA_PRN_IgG", "ELISA_FHA_IgG", "ELISA_PT_IgG", "PT_IgG", "PRN_IgG", "FHA_IgG", "TT_IgG", "DT_IgG", "gB_IgG")

# supervised_clusters = list(
#   c("IgG"),
#   c("IgG1"),
#   c("IgG2"),
#   c("IgG3"),
#   c("IgG4"),
#   c("FcgR2a"),
#   c("FcgR3b"),
#   c("ADCD"),
#   c("ADCP"),
#   c("ADNP")
# )

analytes_order <- c("IgG","IgG3","IgG1","IgG2","IgG4","FcgR2a","FcgR3b","ADCD","ADCP","ADNP","SBA","PTNA")
arms <- c("TdaP", "TT")
refarms <- c("TT","TdaP")

residual_pathname_ap <-"./data/igg_standard_residuals_ap_matpm_prevacvacc_k.RData"
modelfit_pathname_ap <-"./data/igg_standard_model_fit_ap_matpm_prevacvacc_k.RData"
residual_filename_ap <- here::here(residual_pathname_ap)
modelfit_filename_ap <- here::here(modelfit_pathname_ap)

residual_pathname_wp <-"./data/igg_standard_residuals_wp_matpm_prevacvacc_k.RData"
modelfit_pathname_wp <-"./data/igg_standard_model_fit_wp_matpm_prevacvacc_k.RData"
residual_filename_wp <- here::here(residual_pathname_wp)
modelfit_filename_wp <- here::here(modelfit_pathname_wp)

# residual_pathname_ap <-"./data/igg_standard_residuals_ap_matpm_alltime.RData"
# modelfit_pathname_ap <-"./data/igg_standard_model_fit_ap_matpm_alltime.RData"
# residual_filename_ap <- here("./data/igg_standard_residuals_ap_matpm_alltime.RData")
# modelfit_filename_ap <- here("./data/igg_standard_model_fit_ap_matpm_alltime.RData")
# 
# residual_pathname_wp <-"./data/igg_standard_residuals_wp_matpm_alltime.RData"
# modelfit_pathname_wp <-"./data/igg_standard_model_fit_wp_matpm_alltime.RData"
# residual_filename_wp <- here("./data/igg_standard_residuals_wp_matpm_alltime.RData")
# modelfit_filename_wp <- here("./data/igg_standard_model_fit_wp_matpm_alltime.RData")

```

```{r loaddata, include=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
#### load data
load(file = here::here("./data/c_set.RData"))
data <- ebaa_extra
data$arm_name <- data$maternal_arm
data$arm_name <- fct_recode(data$arm_name, "TT" = "TT", "TdaP" = "TdaP")
data$feature <- factor(paste(data$antigen, data$analyte, sep = "_"))

table(data$maternal_arm)
table(data$arm_name)
table(data$infant_arm)
table(data$visit_name)
table(data$feature)

## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Remap whole-bacterium functional assays onto their representative antigen so
## they appear as extra analyte columns in the bubble plots:
##   WHOLE_SBA  -> PRN_SBA   (analyte "SBA"  under antigen "PRN")
##   WHOLE_PTNA -> PT_PTNA   (analyte "PTNA" under antigen "PT")
## We coerce antigen/analyte/feature to character to avoid factor-level clashes,
## then bind the relabelled rows back onto the raw data BEFORE the include_feature
## filter (PRN_SBA / PT_PTNA were added to include_feature in the setup chunk).
## If no WHOLE_* rows are found, this is a no-op (with a warning) so the rest of
## the pipeline still runs on the original feature set.
data$antigen <- as.character(data$antigen)
data$analyte <- as.character(data$analyte)
data$feature <- as.character(data$feature)

func_src <- data[data$feature %in% functional_remap$source_feature, , drop = FALSE]
if (nrow(func_src) == 0) {
  warning("functional_remap: none of ", paste(functional_remap$source_feature, collapse = ", "),
          " were found in the data; SBA/PTNA will be absent. Check table(ebaa_extra$feature).")
} else {
  func_src <- merge(func_src, functional_remap,
                    by.x = "feature", by.y = "source_feature", all.x = TRUE)
  func_src$antigen <- func_src$display_antigen
  func_src$analyte <- func_src$display_analyte
  func_src$feature <- paste(func_src$antigen, func_src$analyte, sep = "_")
  func_src$display_antigen <- NULL
  func_src$display_analyte <- NULL
  data <- dplyr::bind_rows(data, func_src[, names(data)])
}
data$feature <- factor(data$feature)
data$antigen <- factor(data$antigen)
data$analyte <- factor(data$analyte)
table(data$feature)   # confirm PRN_SBA and PT_PTNA are now present

# igg_data <- pivot_wider(data = data[data$feature %in% c("PT_IgG","PT_Total_IgG"), colnames(data) != "analyte"], names_from = "feature", values_from = "value_reported")
# 
# ggplot(data=igg_data, mapping = aes(x = PT_IgG, y = PT_Total_IgG)) +
#   geom_point()
# 
# chka_set <- data[data$infant_arm=="wP" & data$feature == "PT_IgG" & data$visit_name == "prevaccinated",]
# ggplot(data=chka_set, mapping = aes(x = arm_name, y = value_reported)) +
#   geom_point()
# 
# chkb_set <- data[data$infant_arm=="wP" & data$feature == "PT_Total_IgG" & data$visit_name == "prevaccinated",]
# ggplot(data=chkb_set, mapping = aes(x = arm_name, y = value_reported)) +
#   geom_point()

data <- data[data$feature %in% include_feature, 
             c("visit_name","subject_accession","antigen","arm_name", "analyte", "infant_arm", "feature","value_reported","log_assay_value")]
data$feature <- droplevels(data$feature)
table(data$arm_name)
table(data$maternal_arm)
table(data$visit_name)
table(data$feature)

ddata <- distinct(data[data$feature %in% include_feature , c("infant_arm", "visit_name","subject_accession","antigen","arm_name", "analyte", "feature", "value_reported","log_assay_value")], subject_accession, visit_name, feature, .keep_all = TRUE)

ddata$arm_name <- factor(ddata$arm_name)
table(ddata$arm_name)
ddata$arm_name <- relevel(ddata$arm_name, ref=as.character(refarms[1]))
table(ddata$arm_name)
data <- ddata
data <- data[data$arm_name %in% arms, ]
data <- data[data$visit_name %in% visit_list, ]

data$arm_name <- droplevels(data$arm_name)
data$visit_name <- droplevels(data$visit_name)

data$study_accession <- ifelse(data$arm_name %in% arms, "SDY2818", NA)
# names(check_assessment_wide)[names(check_assessment_wide) == "gestational_age_vaccination"] <- "gestational_age_at_vaccine"
# names(check_assessment_wide)[names(check_assessment_wide) == "gestational_age_birth"] <- "gestational_age_at_delivery"
# names(check_assessment_wide)[names(check_assessment_wide) == "infant_interval_between_vaccination_and_delivery_days"] <- "vaccine_birth_interval_days"
# names(check_assessment_wide)[names(check_assessment_wide) == "maternal_age"] <- "maternal_age_at_delivery"
# 
# data_clin <- dplyr::distinct(check_assessment_wide[ , c("study_accession","subject_accession", "birth_weight", "infant_sex", "delivery_mode", "parity", "gravidity", "gestational_age_at_vaccine", "vaccine_birth_interval_days", "gestational_age_at_delivery", "maternal_age_at_delivery")])
# data_clin$birth_weight <- as.numeric(data_clin$birth_weight)/1000
# data$log_assay_value <- log10(data$value_reported+1)

table(data$feature)

```


```{r unstandardized_data, include=FALSE}
data_e <- data[data$feature %in% igglist
                 & data$visit_name==t0
                 # & data$antigen %in% antigenlist
               , c("subject_accession","antigen","value_reported","log_assay_value")]
# data_e$log_igg_t0 <- log2(data_e$value_reported + 1)
data_e$subject_accession <- droplevels(factor(data_e$subject_accession))
data_e$antigen <- droplevels(data_e$antigen)
names(data_e)[names(data_e) == "value_reported"] <-"igg_t0"
names(data_e)[names(data_e) == "log_assay_value"] <-"log_igg_t0"


data_es <- data_e[ , c("subject_accession", "antigen", "log_igg_t0")]
data_es$antigen <- paste(data_es$antigen, "IgGt0", sep = "_")
data_ee <- pivot_wider(data = data_es, names_from = antigen, values_from = log_igg_t0)

data <- data[data$feature %in% include_feature
             & data$arm_name %in% arms
             & data$visit_name %in% visit_list,
             c("visit_name","subject_accession","antigen", "analyte", "infant_arm","arm_name","feature","value_reported","log_assay_value")]

data$feature <- droplevels(data$feature)
data$antigen <- droplevels(data$antigen)
data$arm_name <- droplevels(data$arm_name)
data$visit_name <- droplevels(data$visit_name)

table(data$feature, data$antigen)
table(data$arm_name)
table(data$arm_name, data$visit_name)

# data <- merge(data, data_clin, by = "subject_accession", all.x = TRUE)
data <- merge(data, data_e, by = c("subject_accession", "antigen"), all.x = TRUE)
data <- merge(data, data_ee, by = c("subject_accession"), all.x = TRUE)

## drop extra arms in factor
data$arm_name <- droplevels(data$arm_name)
## relabel arm_name
data$arm_name <- relevel(data$arm_name, ref=as.character(refarms[1]))
arms <- levels(data$arm_name)
arm.short.color <- rev(arm.apwps.color)
arm.color = arm.short.color
table(data$arm_name)

# data$log_assay_value <- log10(data$value_reported+1)

# data$study_accession <- factor(data$study_accession)
# data$subject_accession <- factor(data$subject_accession)
# data$analyte_reported <- str_split_i(data$feature, "_", 2)
# data$analyte_reported <- factor(data$analyte_reported)
# data$birth_weight <- as.numeric(data$birth_weight)
# data$infant_sex <- factor(data$infant_sex)
# data$parity <- ifelse(data$parity>0,1,0)
# data$parity <- factor(as.numeric(data$parity))
# data$gravidity <- ifelse(data$gravidity>1,2,1)
# data$gravidity <- factor(as.numeric(data$gravidity))
# data$delivery_mode <- factor(data$delivery_mode)
# data$gestational_age_at_vaccine <- as.numeric(data$gestational_age_at_vaccine)
# data$gestational_age_at_delivery <- as.numeric(data$gestational_age_at_delivery)
# data$maternal_age_at_delivery <- as.numeric(data$maternal_age_at_delivery)
# data$vaccine_birth_interval_days <- as.numeric(data$vaccine_birth_interval_days)
# data$log_igg_t0 <- as.numeric(data$log_igg_t0)

data <- as.data.frame(data)
unstandardized_data <- data
unstandardized_data$standstat <- "untransformed"
table(unstandardized_data$feature)
```


```{r standardized_data, include=FALSE}
standardized_data_wp <- standardized_set(standardized_analyte = "IgG",
                                      connection_data = unstandardized_data[unstandardized_data$infant_arm=="wP",],
                                      residual_file = residual_filename_wp
                                      )
standardized_data_ap <- standardized_set(standardized_analyte="IgG",
                                      connection_data = unstandardized_data[unstandardized_data$infant_arm=="aP",],
                                      residual_file=residual_filename_ap
                                      )
standardized_data_not <- rbind(standardized_data_wp, standardized_data_ap)

# standardized_data$log_assay_value <- as.vector(scale(standardized_data$log_assay_value))

total_igg_data <- unstandardized_data[unstandardized_data$feature %in% igglist, names(standardized_data_not)]
# total_igg_data$log_assay_value <- as.vector(scale(total_igg_data$log_assay_value))
standardized_data = rbind(standardized_data_not[, names(total_igg_data)], total_igg_data)
standardized_data$standstat <- "standardized"

# standardized_data_no_total_igg =
# standardized_data %>%
#   filter(!grepl("IgG$", feature))
```

```{r assemble_unstandard_standardized, include=FALSE}
data <- rbind(unstandardized_data, standardized_data)
data$antigen_c <- data$antigen
data$analyte <- factor(str_split_i(as.character(data$feature),"_",2))
dxdata <- distinct(data, standstat, subject_accession, visit_name , feature, .keep_all = TRUE)
dxdata <- dxdata[!is.na(dxdata$value),]
dxdata$visit_number <- visit_number(dxdata$visit_name)
# feature_d_names <- unique(dxdata$feature)
# tdata <- pivot_wider(dxdata, id_cols = c("standstat","subject_accession", "visit_number" ,"visit_name"), names_from = "feature", values_from = "log_assay_value")
table(dxdata$feature)
table(dxdata$visit_name)
table(dxdata$visit_number)
table(dxdata$standstat)

```

```{r trend_loops, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='asis'}
for (standstat in c("untransformed","standardized")) {
    cat("\n\n")
    cat(paste("##", standstat, "{.tabset}", "\n\n"))
    for (visit in visit_list) {
      cat("\n\n")
      cat(paste("###", visit, "{.tabset}", "\n\n"))
      if (visit == t0) {
        infant_arm_list <- c("wP and aP")
      } else {
        infant_arm_list <- c("wP","aP")
      }
      
        for (infant_arm in infant_arm_list) {
          cat("\n\n")
          cat(paste("####", infant_arm, "{.tabset}", "\n\n"))
          if (infant_arm == "wP and aP") {
                      txdatas <- dxdata[dxdata$visit_name==visit,
                           ]
          } else {
                      txdatas <- dxdata[dxdata$visit_name==visit
                           & dxdata$infant_arm==infant_arm,
                           ]
          }

          txdata <- txdatas[txdatas$standstat==standstat,
                           c("subject_accession", "antigen", "analyte", "arm_name", "log_assay_value")
                           ]
          
          p <- plot_arm_effect(data = txdata,
                           effect_color = c("Lower TdaP" = "salmon", "Higher TdaP" = "skyblue", "No effect" = "darkgrey"),
                           analyte_order = c("IgG","IgG3","IgG1","IgG2","IgG4","FcgR2a","FcgR3b","ADCD","ADCP","ADNP","SBA","PTNA"),
                           antigen_order = c("PT", "FHA", "PRN","FIM","DT","TT"), standstat = standstat)
      cat("\n\n")
      print(p)
      cat("\n\n")
    #   download_this(txdatas,
    # output_name = "bubbleset_visit_infant",
    # output_extension = ".csv",
    # button_label = "Download data",
    # button_type = "warning",
    # has_icon = TRUE,
    # icon = "fa fa-save")
          
        } # end infant arm loop
    } # end visit loop
} # end standstat loop


```

```{r m02_effect_tables, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='asis'}
## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Effect-size / p-value tables that underlie the month-2 (pre-primary) bubble
## plots, for the manuscript. Built from the SAME compute_arm_effect() used by
## the figure, for the pooled (wP + aP) month-2 infants, separately for the
## untransformed and standardised features. Rendered inline and exported to a
## single Lancet-styled .docx with one table per transform.
## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n\n## Month-2 effect-size and p-value tables {.tabset}\n\n")

m02_stats <- list()
m02_ft <- list()
for (ss in c("untransformed","standardized")) {
  txdata_m02 <- dxdata[dxdata$visit_name == t0 & dxdata$standstat == ss,
                       c("subject_accession","antigen","analyte","arm_name","log_assay_value")]
  st <- compute_arm_effect(
    data = txdata_m02,
    analyte_order = c("IgG","IgG3","IgG1","IgG2","IgG4","FcgR2a","FcgR3b","ADCD","ADCP","ADNP","SBA","PTNA"),
    antigen_order = c("PT","FHA","PRN","FIM","DT","TT"),
    standstat = ss)
  m02_stats[[ss]] <- st
  cap <- sprintf("Table: Maternal Tdap-IPV vs tetanus toxoid effect on month-2 systems serology (%s features).", ss)
  ft <- lancet_effect_table(st, caption = cap)
  m02_ft[[ss]] <- ft
  cat(sprintf("\n\n### %s\n\n", ss))
  flextable::flextable_to_rmd(ft)
  cat("\n\n")
}

## Export both tables to one Word file (Lancet-styled).
out_dir <- here::here("output")
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)
out_docx <- file.path(out_dir, "M02_effect_size_pvalue_table.docx")
try(flextable::save_as_docx(
  `Untransformed (absolute)` = m02_ft[["untransformed"]],
  `Standardised (relative to total IgG)` = m02_ft[["standardized"]],
  path = out_docx,
  pr_section = officer::prop_section(
    page_size = officer::page_size(orient = "landscape"),
    type = "continuous")), silent = TRUE)

## Also save the raw statistics as CSV for the supplement / record.
try(write.csv(dplyr::bind_rows(m02_stats),
              file.path(out_dir, "M02_effect_size_pvalue_stats.csv"),
              row.names = FALSE), silent = TRUE)
```

```{r workflowr, include=FALSE}
## workflowr::wflow_build(files = here::here("./analysis/response_bubbles_matpm_v3.Rmd"))
```
